key_models.account.account: General ledger account. Fields: code, name, account_type, reconcile, deprecated, tax_ids, group_id, company_id.
key_models.account.group: Account hierarchy group. Fields: code_prefix_start, code_prefix_end, parent_id.
key_models.account.journal: Accounting journal. Fields: name, type (sale/purchase/cash/bank/general), default_account_id, code, sequence_id, company_id, available_payment_method_ids.
key_models.account.move: Journal entry / invoice / bill. Fields: move_type (out_invoice, in_invoice, out_refund, in_refund, entry), state (draft, posted, cancel), journal_id, partner_id, invoice_date, date, amount_total, line_ids.
key_models.account.move.line: Move line. Fields: account_id, partner_id, debit, credit, tax_ids, analytic_distribution, amount_currency, currency_id, move_id, reconciliation.
key_models.account.payment: Payment record. Fields: payment_type (inbound/outbound), partner_type, amount, date, journal_id, payment_method_id, move_id, ref.
key_models.account.tax: Tax definition. Fields: name, amount, amount_type, type_tax_use, tax_group_id, invoice_repartition_line_ids, refund_repartition_line_ids, country_id.
key_models.account.tax.repartition.line: Tax distribution. Fields: repartition_type (base/tax), factor_percent, account_id, tag_ids, use_in_tax_closing.
key_models.account.fiscal.position: Fiscal position. Fields: name, auto_apply, country_id, country_group_id, state_ids, tax_ids (mapping), account_ids (mapping), company_id.
key_models.account.bank.statement: Bank statement. Fields: name, date, journal_id, line_ids, balance_start, balance_end_real.
key_models.account.bank.statement.line: Statement line. Fields: date, payment_ref, partner_id, amount, journal_id, statement_id, move_id.
key_models.account.reconcile.model: Reconciliation model. Fields: name, rule_type (writeoff_button, invoice_matching, writeoff_suggestion), match_text_location_label, amount_type, line_ids.
key_models.account.asset: Fixed asset (Enterprise). Fields: name, original_value, book_value, acquisition_date, depreciation_number, method_period, depreciation_move_ids.
key_models.account.asset.category: Asset category (Enterprise). Fields: account_depreciation_id, account_depreciation_expense_id, method, method_number, method_period.
key_models.account.report: Financial report (Enterprise). Fields: name, line_ids, root_report_id, country_id, filter_cash_basis, filter_analytic, filter_date_range.
key_models.account.analytic.account: Analytic account. Fields: name, plan_id, company_id.
key_models.account.analytic.plan: Analytic plan. Fields: name, default_applicability, company_id.

key_files.account/models/account_move.py: Core account.move model and posting logic
key_files.account/models/account_move_line.py: Move line model, reconciliation, analytic distribution
key_files.account/models/account_account.py: Chart of accounts and account groups

security_groups.account.group_account_invoice: Create invoices, bills, payments, and journal entries
security_groups.account.group_account_manager: Full accounting configuration and chart of accounts

record_rules.account_move_rule_portal: Portal user access to own invoices via access_token.
